sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102704" key="taxuki/nhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰχῠ-κίνησις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n102704.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quick movement</tr_>, ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
